title: Dataset
description: A collection of data published or curated by one provider

otherIdentifier.title: other identifier
otherIdentifier.description: Additional identifiers for the dataset besides the main identifier, such as a DOI or other persistent ID

sample.title: sample
sample.description: List of sample distributions for the dataset

status.title: lifecycle status
status.description: Lifecycle status of the dataset, such as completed, deprecated, under development, or withdrawn

anyOf.description: inline description of the supported schema

versionNotes.title: version notes
versionNotes.description: Notes describing how this version differs from earlier versions of the dataset
examples: Initial release of 2024 climate observations data.

contactPoint.title: contact point
contactPoint.description: A contact point for questions about the Dataset (single contact or list). Include an email address that is continuously monitored

distribution.title: dataset distribution
distribution.description: List of available distributions for the dataset. This can be omitted when no distribution is available yet.

first.title: first
first.description: the first item of the sequence the dataset belongs to

hasCurrentVersion.title: current version
hasCurrentVersion.description: reference to the current (latest) version of a dataset

hasVersion.title: has version
hasVersion.description: List of related Datasets that are a version, edition, or adaptation of the described Dataset

inSeries.title: in series
inSeries.description: Dataset series this dataset belongs to

keyword.title: keyword/tag
keyword.description: List of keywords or tags describing the dataset

landingPage.title: landing page
landingPage.description: A web page from the original data provider that gives access to the Dataset, its Distributions, and related information

previousVersion.title: previous version
previousVersion.description: reference to the previous dataset version

qualifiedRelation.title: qualified relation
qualifiedRelation.description: Detailed relationship between the dataset and another resource, including the role of that relationship

spatialResolutionInMeters.title: Spatial resolution (meters)
spatialResolutionInMeters.description: Smallest spatial distance between data points, in meters, represented as a single value

temporalResolution.title: temporal resolution
temporalResolution.description: Smallest time interval between data points, using xsd:duration format (for example, P1D)

theme.title: theme/category
theme.description: List of themes or categories for the dataset

version.title: version
version.description: The version indicator (name or identifier) of a resource

describedBy.title: data dictionary
describedBy.description: A distribution describing the Data Dictionary for this dataset

liabilityStatement.title: liability statement
liabilityStatement.description: A liability statement about the dataset that may clarify limitations of responsibility, qualifications on the accuracy, reliability, and completeness of the data, or absence of endorsement by the data publisher or provider, among other considerations

anyOf.description: Full text of the liability statement

examples: This dataset is provided as-is without warranty of any kind. Users are responsible for determining fitness for their intended use.

metadataDistribution.title: metadata distribution
metadataDistribution.description: Distribution of the original metadata document this dataset was derived from

purpose.title: purpose
examples: To provide comprehensive, high-quality climate observations for research, planning, and decision-making related to weather and climate.

accessRights.title: access rights
accessRights.description: Information about whether the dataset is publicly accessible, restricted, or not public

anyOf.description: Text description of the access rights

examples: Public access with no restrictions. Data is freely available for download and use.

accrualPeriodicity.title: frequency
accrualPeriodicity.description: The frequency at which the Dataset is updated

anyOf.description: ISO-8601 Maintenance Frequency code for recurring values, see https://www.iso.org/standard/70907.html
Dublin Core Collection Frequency Vocabulary, see https://www.dublincore.org/specifications/dublin-core/collection-description/frequency/#vocabulary-terms

conformsTo.title: conforms to
conformsTo.description: List of standards, schemas, or profiles the dataset follows

contributor.title: contributor
contributor.description: List of agents contributing to the Dataset

created.title: creation date
created.description: The date on which the Dataset was first created

anyOf.description: A year and month in YYYY-MM format

creator.title: creator
creator.description: Person or organization responsible for creating the dataset

description.title: description
examples: Daily temperature, precipitation, and wind measurements from monitoring stations across the United States.
Comprehensive daily climate observations collected from monitoring stations across the United States, including temperature, precipitation, humidity, and wind measurements.

hasPart.title: has part
hasPart.description: List of related datasets that are part of the described dataset

identifier.title: identifier
identifier.description: The unique identifier for the Dataset, e.g. the URI or other unique identifier in the context of the Catalog

isReferencedBy.title: is referenced by
isReferencedBy.description: List of links to related resources, such as publications, that reference, cite, or otherwise point to the Dataset

issued.title: release date
issued.description: Date when the dataset was first published. If the exact publication date is unknown, use the date it was first referenced in the catalog.

anyOf.description: A year and month in YYYY-MM format

_oldDocs.range: rdfs:Literal (typed as xsd:date, xsd:dateTime, xsd:gYear or xsd:gYearMonth)

language.title: language
language.description: ISO 639-1 language code values used in the dataset text or metadata, such as en or es, full list can be seen at https://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/iso639-1.html

modified.title: last modified
modified.description: Most recent date when the dataset's actual data changed, not just metadata

anyOf.description: A year and month in YYYY-MM format

_oldDocs.range: rdfs:Literal (typed as xsd:date, xsd:dateTime, xsd:gYear or xsd:gYearMonth)

provenance.title: provenance
provenance.description: List of statements about the lineage of a Dataset, including any changes in its ownership or custody since its creation that may be significant for its authenticity, integrity, or interpretation

items.description: Full text of the provenance statement

examples: Data collected from automated weather stations deployed at 2,500 locations across the continental United States.
Quality control procedures applied according to WMO guidelines.

publisher.title: publisher
publisher.description: Organization responsible for publishing and making the dataset available

relation.title: related resource
relation.description: List of links to related resources when the relationship is not otherwise specified

replaces.title: replaces
replaces.description: List of Datasets replaced by this Dataset

rights.title: rights
rights.description: Rights statements not already covered by license or accessRights, such as copyright or policy restrictions

items.description: Full text of a statement of rights

examples: Data is provided as-is without warranty. Please cite the National Climate Data Center when using this data.
This data is in the public domain and may be used without restriction.

rightsHolder.title: rights holder
rightsHolder.description: List of agents (organizations) holding rights on the Dataset

source.title: data source
source.description: List of related Datasets from which the described Dataset is derived

spatial.title: spatial/geographic coverage
spatial.description: A geographic region or regions that are covered by the Dataset

subject.title: subject
subject.description: List of primary subjects for the dataset, usually narrower than broad theme categories

temporal.title: temporal coverage
temporal.description: Time periods covered by the dataset

category.title: category
category.description: List of high-level categories for the dataset

hasQualityMeasurement.title: quality measurement
hasQualityMeasurement.description: List of quality measurements for the dataset (for example, completeness, accuracy, or timeliness) beyond spatial or temporal resolution

page.title: documentation
page.description: List of pages or documents about this dataset

qualifiedAttribution.title: qualified attribution
qualifiedAttribution.description: List of agents with specific responsibilities for the dataset

wasAttributedTo.title: attribution
wasAttributedTo.description: List of agents attributed to this dataset

wasGeneratedBy.title: was generated by
wasGeneratedBy.description: List of activities that generated, or provide the business context for the creation of the dataset

wasUsedBy.title: used by
wasUsedBy.description: List of activities that used the Dataset

image.title: image
image.description: Thumbnail image illustrating the dataset, especially useful for visual data such as maps, photos, or video

scopeNote.title: usage note
examples: This dataset contains raw observational data. For derived products such as monthly averages or climate normals, see related datasets.

_oldDocs.rationale: The update of dcat:Dataset is crucial as it aligns the DCAT profile with international standards, offering a standardized and widely recognized way to describe datasets. This alignment enhances data interoperability and discoverability, enabling data publishers to provide structured metadata, improving data sharing, and facilitating seamless integration for users and applications.

examples.title: Daily Climate Observations 2024
examples.description: Daily temperature, precipitation, and wind measurements from monitoring stations across the United States.
rights: Data is provided as-is without warranty. Please cite the National Climate Data Center when using this data.
